use_codes.desc: METHOD FOR THE DETECTION OF NEUROENDOCRINE TUMORS

indications.text:
Indium In-111 pentetreotide is an agent for the scintigraphic localization of primary and
metastatic neuroendocrine tumors bearing somatostatin receptors.

Octreoscan, after radiolabeling, is an agent for the scintigraphic localization of primary
and metastatic neuroendocrine tumors bearing somatostatin receptors.
